description.unified: Removes all negative effects from self and grants all allies [Reading the Wind] for 7sec, increasing ATK by [333->302] and Physical Evasion by 300. If a target under [Reading the Wind] successfully evades, all allies’ Crit DMG is increased by 2% for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
[Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target's Max HP.

On hit, increases the target's Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by [ {1} -> 100 ] for [10 sec -> {1} sec]. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by [ {2}% -> {4}% ], and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
